creator: bsam@ipt.ru
text:
I don't understand what I've done incorrectly and what should be done:

1. You are speaking about
http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=107894 ?

2. The patch from that PR is applied:
http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/cvsweb.cgi/ports/security/sguil-sensor/files/sensor_agent.sh.in.diff?r1=1.1&r2=1.2&f=h

Please, provide a patch against current port. Thanks.

-- 
bsam
